title: Update HowItWorksSection CTA button link to livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/

requirements.text: In HowItWorksSection.tsx, update the CTA button (located as the 4th button in section 4 of the page, matching XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[4]/div[3]/button[1]) to be an anchor element linking to 'https://livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/' opening in a new tab, while preserving its existing label and styling.

quotes: Use this link in this button

acceptanceCriteria: The CTA button in HowItWorksSection navigates to 'https://livehostingtalents.com/apply-now/' when clicked.
The link opens in a new tab (target='_blank' with rel='noopener noreferrer').
The button's existing visual appearance and label are unchanged.
No other buttons or links on the page are modified.

constraints: Only modify the specific CTA button in HowItWorksSection.tsx matching the provided XPath.
Do not alter any other components or links.
nonGoals: Changing any other buttons or links on the page.
Updating the AppPreviewSection or HeroSection CTA links.
